allow: Bash(pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --name init)
Bash(docker exec workout-app-postgres-1 psql -U workout -d workout_app -c '\\dt')

Bash(node -e "const path = require\(''path''\); const dir = path.resolve\(__dirname, ''dist''\); console.log\(''__dirname in dist would be:'', dir\); console.log\(''resolved .env:'', path.resolve\(dir, ''..'', ''.env''\)\); const fs = require\(''fs''\); console.log\(''file exists:'', fs.existsSync\(path.resolve\(dir, ''..'', ''.env''\)\)\); console.log\(''file contents:'', fs.readFileSync\(path.resolve\(dir, ''..'', ''.env''\), ''utf-8''\)\);")
Bash(docker exec workout-app-postgres-1 psql -U workout -d workout_app -c "SELECT name, body_region FROM muscle_groups ORDER BY body_region, name;")
Bash(docker exec workout-app-postgres-1 psql -U workout -d workout_app -c ":*)

Bash(npx --yes tsx -e "import { z } from ''zod''; console.log\(''z.enum:'', typeof z.enum\); console.log\(''z.object:'', typeof z.object\); const s = z.object\({ name: z.string\(\) }\); console.log\(''parse:'', s.parse\({ name: ''test'' }\)\); const vals = [''A'', ''B''] as const; const e = z.enum\(vals\); console.log\(''enum parse:'', e.parse\(''A''\)\);")

Bash(pnpm --filter @workout/api exec tsx -e "import { z } from ''zod''; console.log\(''z.enum:'', typeof z.enum\); console.log\(''z.object:'', typeof z.object\); const s = z.object\({ name: z.string\(\) }\); console.log\(''parse:'', s.parse\({ name: ''test'' }\)\); const vals = [''A'', ''B''] as const; const e = z.enum\(vals\); console.log\(''enum parse:'', e.parse\(''A''\)\);")
Bash(pnpm --filter @workout/api remove jest ts-jest @types/jest ts-loader ts-node tsconfig-paths source-map-support)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Title: {d[""info""][""title""]}''\); print\(f''Version: {d[""info""][""version""]}''\); print\(f''Paths: {list\(d[""paths""].keys\(\)\)}''\); print\(f''Security: {list\(d.get\(""components"",{}\).get\(""securitySchemes"",{}\).keys\(\)\)}''\)")
